cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who ends up with which book. So, there are five friends: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a specific book: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: Ulysses - Claire: The Fellowship of the Ring - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Now, there are a series of trades. Let me go through each trade step by step and track who has which book. First trade: Claire and Bob swap books. - Claire originally had The Fellowship of the Ring, now she has Ulysses (from Bob). - Bob originally had Ulysses, now he has The Fellowship of the Ring (from Claire). After first trade: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: The Fellowship of the Ring - Claire: Ulysses - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Second trade: Claire and Dave swap books. - Claire had Ulysses, now she has Lolita (from Dave). - Dave had Lolita, now he has Ulysses (from Claire). After second trade: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: The Fellowship of the Ring - Claire:
